title: Midas Capital - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Rounding vulnerability in interest rate calculation leading to loss of funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates interest rate calculations with rounding vulnerabilities

summary: Midas Capital suffered a loss of $600k due to a rounding vulnerability in their interest rate calculation, similar to an earlier exploit at Hundred Finance. A guard could have blocked transactions manipulating interest rates with rounding vulnerabilities.
